swahili.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — kichunguzi cha hisabati cha 3D kinachotegemea vitalu. Tumia WASD kusonga, kipanya kuangalia, bonyeza kushoto kuvunja vitalu, bonyeza kulia kuweka vitalu.
swahili.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Chapisha kadi ili kujenga muundo huu kwa vitalu halisi
swahili.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Lugha ya nyumbani ya mwanafunzi kwa usemi wa lugha mbili wa NPC
swahili.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Lugha ya nyumbani ya mwanafunzi — NPC watazungumza kwa lugha mbili
swahili.time_of_day_environment_preset: Wakati wa siku / mpangilio wa awali wa mazingira
swahili.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Hamisha miundo kama faili ya STL kwa uchapishaji wa 3D
swahili.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Piga picha ya skrini ya ulimwengu wako (huhifadhiwa kwenye vipakuliwa)
swahili.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Chapisha laha-kazi mwenza kwa somo hili
swahili.import_a_world_from_json_file: Leta ulimwengu kutoka faili la JSON
swahili.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Hamisha uchanganuzi wa kipindi kama CSV kwa utafiti
swahili.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Hamisha ripoti ya ufuatiliaji wa maendeleo ya MTSS (uainishaji wa viwango vya RTI, data ya muda mrefu)
swahili.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Shiriki ulimwengu huu kwenye maktaba ya darasa
swahili.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Vinjari ulimwengu uliosharikiwa na wanafunzi wenzako
swahili.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Eleza mada ya somo la jiometri kwa uzalishaji wa AI
swahili.generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Kina cha uzalishaji: idadi ya mipito ya AI
swahili.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Vinjari masomo yaliyohifadhiwa yaliyozalishwa na AI
swahili.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Boresha: "Lifanye gumu zaidi" / "Ongeza NPC zaidi" / "Badilisha mada kuwa bahari"...
swahili.edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Hariri JSON ghafi ya somo kwa mkono
swahili.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Ukanda wa dira wa NPC unaoonyesha mwelekeo wa jamaa kwa kila NPC kutoka mwelekeo wa kamera
swahili.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Funga viwekeleo vyote vilivyofunguliwa na urudi kwenye mwonekano wa mchezo
swahili.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Funga viwekeleo vyote na urudi kwenye mchezo wa 3D (au bonyeza Shift+Esc)
swahili.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: NPC aseme nini? (k.m. "Angalia muundo nyuma yangu!")
swahili.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Chaguo za majibu, zilizotenganishwa na herufi ya mstari wima
swahili.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Geuza matangazo ya kuratibu ya kisomaji skrini (kitufe C)
swahili.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Geuza hali ya kuruka (au gusa Space mara mbili)
swahili.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Futa vitalu ULIVYOWEKA wewe tu (miundo ya somo inabaki). Inafaa kuanza upya jaribio.
swahili.skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Ruka mafunzo na uendelee kwenye somo
swahili.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Ni jambo gani la kuvutia zaidi ulilogundua? Mkakati upi ulikusaidia kutatua matatizo?
swahili.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Bonyeza ili kusikia tafsiri ikisomwa kwa sauti
swahili.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Tafsiri mazungumzo haya kwa AI (hutumia ombi moja la AI)
swahili.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, nina shida kufikiri sasa hivi. Jaribu kuuliza kwa njia nyingine!
swahili.close_class_worlds_browser: Funga kivinjari cha ulimwengu wa darasa
swahili.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_3d_world: Geuza skrini nzima kwa ulimwengu wa 3D

somali.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — baadhe xisaabeed 3D oo ku saleysan block. Isticmaal WASD si aad u dhaqaaqdo, jiirka si aad u eegto, guji bidix si aad u jabiso block-yada, guji midig si aad u dhigto block-yada.
somali.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Daabac kaadh si aad qaab-dhismeedkan ugu dhisto cubes jir ah
somali.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Luqadda guriga ee ardayga ee hadalka laba-luqadeed ee NPC
somali.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Luqadda guriga ee ardayga — NPC waxay ku hadli doonaan laba luqadood
somali.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Dhoofi qaab-dhismeedyada sida fayl STL ah daabacaadda 3D
somali.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Qaado sawir shaashadeed adduunkaaga (lagu kaydiyo soo-dejisyada)
somali.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Daabac warqadda shaqada ee la socota casharkan
somali.import_a_world_from_json_file: Soo deji adduun fayl JSON ah
somali.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Dhoofi falanqaynta fadhiga sida CSV cilmi-baaris
somali.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Dhoofi warbixinta la socodka horumarka MTSS (kala-saaridda heerarka RTI, xog-dheer)
somali.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Fiiri adduunyooyinka ay wadaageen ardayda kale
somali.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Sharax mawduuc cashar joomatari ah abuurista AI
somali.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Fiiri casharrada la kaydiyey ee AI abuuray
somali.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Sifee: "Ka adkee" / "Ku dar NPC dheeraad ah" / "U beddel mawduuca badweyn"...
somali.edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Tafatir JSON-ka cad ee casharka gacanta
somali.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Xarig kambas NPC oo muujinaya jihada xidhiidhka ee NPC kasta laga bilaabo jihada kamarada
somali.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Xir dhammaan daboolyada furan oo ku noqo muuqaalka ciyaarta
somali.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Xir dhammaan daboolyada oo ku noqo ciyaarta 3D (ama riix Shift+Esc)
somali.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: Maxuu NPC sheegayaa? (tusaale "Eeg qaab-dhismeedka iga dambeeya!")
somali.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Doorashooyinka jawaabta, oo lagu kala saaray xarafka xariiqda toosan
somali.answers_separated_by_e_g_24_units_12_u: Jawaabaha lagu kala saaray | (tusaale 24 unug|12 unug|36 unug)
somali.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Bedel ku-dhawaaqida iskudubaridka akhriste shaashadeed (furaha C)
somali.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Bedel habka duulista (ama laba jeer taabo Space)
somali.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Tirtir oo keliya block-yada AAD dhigtay (qaab-dhismeedyada casharku way hadhaan). Waxay u faa'iido leedahay dib-u-bilaabidda tijaabo.
somali.skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Ka bood tutorial-ka oo u gudub casharka
somali.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Maxay ahayd waxa ugu xiisaha badan ee aad ogaatay? Istraatijiyad noocee ah ayaa kaa caawisay xallinta dhibaatooyinka?
somali.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Guji si aad u maqasho turjumaada oo cod sare lagu akhriyo
somali.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Turjun wadahadalkan AI (wuxuu isticmaalaa hal codsi AI)
somali.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, hadda way igu adag tahay inaan fikiro. Isku day inaad si kale u weydiiso!

hausa.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — mai bincike na lissafi 3D bisa tubali. Yi amfani da WASD don motsi, linzami don kallo, danna hagu don karya tubali, danna dama don sanya tubali.
hausa.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Buga katin don gina wannan tsari da kubobi na zahiri
hausa.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Harshen gida na ɗalibi don maganar NPC mai harsuna biyu
hausa.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Harshen gida na ɗalibi — NPC za su yi magana da harsuna biyu
hausa.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Fitar da tsare-tsare a matsayin fayil na STL don bugu na 3D
hausa.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Ɗauki hoton allo na duniyarka (ana ajiyewa cikin saukarwa)
hausa.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Buga takardar aiki ta rakiya don wannan darasi
hausa.import_a_world_from_json_file: Shigo da duniya daga fayil na JSON
hausa.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Fitar da nazarin zaman a matsayin CSV don bincike
hausa.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Fitar da rahoton sa ido na ci gaban MTSS (rarrabuwar matakan RTI, bayanan dogon lokaci)
hausa.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Raba wannan duniya zuwa ɗakin karatu na aji
hausa.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Yi bincike a duniyoyin da abokan aji suka raba
hausa.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Bayyana taken darasin geometry don ƙirƙirar AI
hausa.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Yi bincike a darussan da aka ajiye da AI ya ƙirƙira
hausa.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Tace: "Ka sa shi ya yi wuya" / "Ƙara ƙarin NPC" / "Canza take zuwa teku"...
hausa.edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Gyara JSON ɗanyen darasi da hannu
hausa.blocks_placed_this_session: Tubalin da aka sanya a wannan zaman
hausa.xp_earned_this_session: XP da aka samu a wannan zaman
hausa.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Ratsin kamfas na NPC da ke nuna alkiblar dangantaka zuwa kowane NPC daga fuskar kyamara
hausa.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Rufe dukkan abubuwan da aka buɗe ka koma ga kallon wasa
hausa.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Rufe dukkan abubuwan ɗora ka koma ga wasan 3D (ko danna Shift+Esc)
hausa.delete_this_saved_lesson: Share wannan darasin da aka ajiye
hausa.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: Me NPC ya kamata ya ce? (misali "Dubi tsarin da ke bayana!")
hausa.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Zaɓuɓɓukan amsa, an raba su da haruffan layi tsaye
hausa.answers_separated_by_e_g_24_units_12_u: Amsoshin da aka raba da | (misali raka'a 24|raka'a 12|raka'a 36)
hausa.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Sauya sanarwar daidaitawa na mai karanta allo (maɓalli C)
hausa.announce_coordinates_to_screen_reader_: Sanar da daidaitawa ga mai karanta allo (C)
hausa.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Sauya yanayin tashi (ko danna Space sau biyu)
hausa.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Share kawai tubalin da KAI ka sanya (tsarin darasi yana nan). Yana da amfani don sake fara gwaji.
hausa.skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Tsallake koyawa ka ci gaba zuwa darasi
hausa.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Mene ne abu mafi ban sha'awa da ka gano? Wace dabara ce ta taimaka maka warware matsaloli?
hausa.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Danna don jin fassarar da ake karantawa da ƙarfi
hausa.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Fassara wannan tattaunawa da AI (yana amfani da buƙatar AI ɗaya)
hausa.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, ina da matsala wajen tunani yanzu. Gwada tambaya ta wata hanya dabam!
hausa.close_class_worlds_browser: Rufe mai bincike na duniyoyin aji

yoruba.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — olùṣàwárí ìṣirò 3D tó dá lórí bíríkì. Lo WASD láti gbé, eku láti wò, tẹ òsì láti fọ́ àwọn bíríkì, tẹ ọ̀tún láti gbé àwọn bíríkì kalẹ̀.
yoruba.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Tẹ káàdì jáde láti kọ́ ìró yìí pẹ̀lú àwọn cube gidi
yoruba.built_in_lessons: Àwọn Ẹ̀kọ́ Tí A Kọ́ Sínú
yoruba.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Èdè ilé akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ fún ọ̀rọ̀ èdè méjì NPC
yoruba.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Èdè ilé akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ — àwọn NPC yóò sọ̀rọ̀ ní èdè méjì
yoruba.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Kó àwọn ìró jáde gẹ́gẹ́ bí fáìlì STL fún ìtẹ̀wé 3D
yoruba.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Ya àwòrán ojú-ìbòjú ayé rẹ (a ó fi pa mọ́ sínú àwọn ìgbàsílẹ̀)
yoruba.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Tẹ ìwé-iṣẹ́ alábàákẹ́gbẹ́ jáde fún ẹ̀kọ́ yìí
yoruba.import_a_world_from_json_file: Kó ayé wọlé láti fáìlì JSON
yoruba.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Kó ìtúpalẹ̀ ìpàdé jáde gẹ́gẹ́ bí CSV fún ìwádìí
yoruba.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Kó ìjábọ̀ àbójútó ìlọsíwájú MTSS jáde (ìpín ìpele RTI, dátà gígùn)
yoruba.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Pín ayé yìí sí ibi-ìkàwé kíláàsì
yoruba.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Ṣàwárí àwọn ayé tí àwọn ẹlẹ́gbẹ́ pín
yoruba.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Ṣàpèjúwe àkọlé ẹ̀kọ́ jiometri fún ìṣẹ̀dá AI
yoruba.generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Ìjìnlẹ̀ ìṣẹ̀dá: iye àwọn ìkọjá AI
yoruba.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Ṣàwárí àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ tí a fi pamọ́ tí AI ṣẹ̀dá
yoruba.refine_the_generated_lesson: Tún ẹ̀kọ́ tí a ṣẹ̀dá ṣe
yoruba.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Tún ṣe: "Mú kí ó le" / "Fi àwọn NPC kún" / "Yí àkọlé padà sí òkun"...
yoruba.edit_the_raw_lesson_json_manually: Ṣàtúnṣe JSON àìṣe ẹ̀kọ́ pẹ̀lú ọwọ́
yoruba.blocks_placed_this_session: Àwọn bíríkì tí a gbé kalẹ̀ nínú ìpàdé yìí
yoruba.correct_answers_this_session: Àwọn ìdáhùn tó tọ̀nà nínú ìpàdé yìí
yoruba.xp_earned_this_session: XP tí a jẹ nínú ìpàdé yìí
yoruba.place_at_least_5_blocks: Gbé ó kéré tán bíríkì 5 kalẹ̀
yoruba.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Okùn kọmpasi NPC tó ń fi ìtọ́sọ́nà ìbátan sí NPC kọ̀ọ̀kan láti ìkọjú kámẹ́rà hàn
yoruba.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Ti gbogbo àwọn ìbòrí tí ó ṣí padà sí ìwòye eré
yoruba.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Ti gbogbo àwọn ìbòrí padà sí eré 3D (tàbí tẹ Shift+Esc)
yoruba.delete_this_saved_lesson: Pa ẹ̀kọ́ tí a fi pamọ́ yìí rẹ́
yoruba.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: Kí ni NPC yẹ kí ó sọ? (b.a. "Wo ìró tí ó wà lẹ́yìn mi!")
yoruba.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Àwọn àṣàyàn ìdáhùn, tí a yà sọ́tọ̀ pẹ̀lú àmì ìlà tóró
yoruba.answers_separated_by_e_g_24_units_12_u: Àwọn ìdáhùn tí a yà sọ́tọ̀ pẹ̀lú | (b.a. ẹyọ 24|ẹyọ 12|ẹyọ 36)
yoruba.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Yí ìkéde ọ̀nà-ìpàdé ti òǹkàwé ojú-ìbòjú padà (bọ́tìnì C)
yoruba.announce_coordinates_to_screen_reader_: Kéde àwọn ọ̀nà-ìpàdé sí òǹkàwé ojú-ìbòjú (C)
yoruba.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Yí ìpò fífò padà (tàbí tẹ Space lẹ́ẹ̀mejì)
yoruba.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Pa àwọn bíríkì TÍ O gbé kalẹ̀ nìkan rẹ́ (àwọn ìró ẹ̀kọ́ dúró). Ó wúlò fún bíbẹ̀rẹ̀ àdánwò lẹ́ẹ̀kansí.
yoruba.skip_tutorial_and_proceed_to_lesson: Fò tutorial náà kọjá kí o sì tẹ̀síwájú sí ẹ̀kọ́
yoruba.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Kí ni ohun tó fani-lọ́kàn-mọ́ra jù tí o ṣàwárí? Ọ̀nà ìlànà wo ni ó ràn ọ́ lọ́wọ́ láti yanjú àwọn ìṣòro?
yoruba.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Tẹ láti gbọ́ ìtumọ̀ tí a kà sókè
yoruba.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Túmọ̀ ìjíròrò yìí pẹ̀lú AI (ó ń lo ìbéèrè AI kan)
yoruba.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, ó ń ṣòro fún mi láti ronú nísinsìnyí. Gbìyànjú láti béèrè ní ọ̀nà mìíràn!
yoruba.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_3d_world: Yí ojú-ìbòjú kíkún padà fún ayé 3D
yoruba.aligned_axes_preserved: 🟢 Tí a tò (a pa àwọn ìtẹ̀ mọ́)
